scripts.build:content: RUSTC="$(rustup which rustc --toolchain stable-aarch64-apple-darwin)" rustup run stable cargo run -p content-packer -- assets/content/game.ron public/content.bin
scripts.build:wasm:dev: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" RUSTC="$(rustup which rustc --toolchain stable-aarch64-apple-darwin)" rustup run stable cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p engine-wasm && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/debug/engine_wasm.wasm --out-dir src/generated --target web --no-typescript
scripts.build:wasm: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" RUSTC="$(rustup which rustc --toolchain stable-aarch64-apple-darwin)" rustup run stable cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p engine-wasm && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/engine_wasm.wasm --out-dir src/generated --target web --no-typescript --omit-default-module-path
scripts.dev: npm run build:content && npm run build:wasm:dev && vite
scripts.build: npm run build:content && npm run build:wasm && vite build
